---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / motivation**
What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen.

**Scope check**
transdoc's north star is "output ≡ input, only the language changes" (layout/format preserved;
cross-format conversion is out of scope). Does your request fit? (See the README "Scope & limits".)

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds or other approaches.
